# CS99 — Pre-enforcement nested CS (CS43 fixture a)

**Status:** done
**Closed:** 2026-05-13

This fixture exercises the CS43 grandfather: the **Closed:** date predates
`IMPLEMENTER_NOT_REVIEWER_RECURSION_ENFORCEMENT_DATE` (2026-05-14), so the
linter must silently skip this file. There is intentionally no
`## Model audit` block — the grandfather makes the absence harmless.
